title: Will Solid Comps Growth Fuel AutoZone's (AZO) Q2 Earnings?
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for AutoZone's (AZO) fiscal Q2 earnings and revenues is $17.80 per share and $3.16 billion, implying a year-over-year uptick of 19.2% and 8.5%, respectively.

title: AutoZone (AZO) Gains But Lags Market: What You Should Know

title: AutoZone Appoints New Board Members
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn., Feb. 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AutoZone, Inc. (NYSE:   AZO), today announced the appointment of Michael George and Brian Hannasch to the AutoZone Board of Directors.

title: AutoZone to Release Second Quarter Earnings March 1, 2022
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn., Feb. 16, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AutoZone, Inc. (NYSE: AZO), the leading retailer and distributor of automotive replacement parts and accessories in the Americas, will release results for its second quarter ended Saturday, February 12, 2022, before market open on Tuesday, March 1, 2022. Additionally, the Company will host a one-hour conference call on Tuesday, March 1, 2022, beginning at 10:00 a.m. (EST), to discuss the results of the quarter. This call is being web cast and can be accessed, along with supporting slides, at AutoZone's website at www.autozone.com and clicking on Investor Relations. Investors may also listen to the call by dialing 877-545-0523, passcode AutoZone. In addition, a telephone replay will be available by dialing 877- 481-4010, replay passcode 44573 through April 1, 2022.

title: A Trio of Stocks Trading With Low Price-to-Free-Cash-Flow Ratios
text: To increase your chances of discovering value opportunities, one method is to screen the market for stocks with lower trailing 12-month price-to-free-cash-flow ratios than that of the S&P 500 Index, which stands at around 15.63 as of the time of writing.

title: Is AutoZone Stock A Buy Or Sell As It Nears All-Time Highs?
text: AutoZone has been an excellent compounder in the past. The factors for that, same-store sales growth and buybacks, are still in place. AZO is not trading at an expensive valuation. In fact, it trades relatively in line with the historic average.

title: 3 High-Flying Stocks May Follow Alphabet and Enact a Stock Split

title: 3 More Companies That Could Benefit Big From a Stock Split
